method: reverse implicit adjoint of the packed energy-gradient residual

correctness_case.physics: finite isotropic pressure, finite axial current, gauge-free lambda

custom_vjp_case.forward: opaque converged host solve through jax.pure_callback

spline_forward_tangent_case.physics: nonaxisymmetric finite-pressure/current equilibrium with gauge-free stream function
spline_forward_tangent_case.method: exact residual JVP and preconditioned implicit solve

assessment: The exact reverse solve is independent of the number of physical controls. It is FD-validated with all four isotropic control groups active. The public custom VJP composes the opaque host solve with the same adjoint and remains matrix-free above the dense reference threshold. Three-color block Thomas is exact but takes 4.79 s versus 3.41 s for one preconditioned-GMRES right-hand side, so GMRES remains the scalar-adjoint default; block mode is retained for future batched sensitivities. Coupled free-boundary adjoints remain open.
